demos.review: An absolute masterpiece. The direction was breathtaking and the acting superb.
demos.reasoning: The reviewer uses superlative language ("absolute masterpiece"), emphasizes the excellence of the direction and acting, indicating a high level of admiration and praise.

demos.review: One of the best films I have ever seen. A timeless classic.
demos.reasoning: The reviewer uses superlative language, such as "one of the best films I have ever seen" and calls it a "timeless classic", which indicates a strong positive opinion.

demos.review: Funny, heartwarming and perfectly paced. An instant favourite.
demos.reasoning: The reviewer uses positive adjectives such as "funny", "heartwarming", and "instant favourite" to describe the film, indicating a strong positive opinion. The tone of the review is also enthusiastic and suggests that the reviewer was thoroughly entertained.

signature.instructions: Assess the sentiment of the text and classify it as positive, negative, or neutral while considering multiple contextual factors.

fields.description: Sentiment (You MUST output exactly one of: Positive, Negative, Mixed)
